title: E-commerce API Documentation
description: Dynamic E-Commerce Workflow Management. The system features dynamic routes for order processing, real-time inventory updates, secure user authentication, automated order reporting, and comprehensive product management. Published publicly using Postman.

title: E-commerce Applcation
description: MERN E-Commerce Platform. The platform features dynamic product catalog with filtering and sorting, real-time search, seamless cart updates, secure checkout, and a comprehensive admin dashboard with real-time analytics and user management capabilities.

title: GlitchZone
description: GlitchZone E-Commerce is a modern and responsive online shopping website that showcases products with an intuitive user interface, featuring product browsing, cart functionality, and a smooth shopping experience. It highlights core front-end development skills in building an interactive e-commerce platform.

title: Blog Application API Documentation
description: Blog Application API is a RESTful back-end service that powers a blogging platform by handling data operations for posts and users. It supports full CRUD functionality, enabling the creation, retrieval, updating, and deletion of blog content, while demonstrating structured routing, middleware usage, and database integration.

title: Blog Application
description: Blog Application is a full-stack web platform that enables users to browse and manage blog posts through a responsive and user-friendly interface. It integrates a RESTful API to handle CRUD operations, demonstrating skills in front-end development, API integration, and data management.
